test_cases.input: So you know my neighbor Emily? She went to this mindfulness retreat... Anyway I should probably add a 10-minute silent meditation to my mornings every single day.
My car's way overdue for an oil change. I'll get to it sometime this week I guess. Just add it. But the scheduled service appointment is tomorrow at 10 AM.

test_cases.description: ADHD Clinical - Working Memory Decay & Self-Correction
test_cases.input: I need to add something important... the pharmacy? No... the email? Wait... Oh! My gym membership renewal! Add 'renew gym membership' as an appointment for this week. Ignore the rest.
I need to finish the... the financial... the money number thing. The report. The quarterly one! Add 'prepare quarterly earnings report' for next Monday.

test_cases.description: ADHD Clinical - Verbal Impulsivity & Rapid Reversal
test_cases.input: Add a daily 5:30 AM cold shower to my routine. Actually no, that's insane. Cancel that. Make it a 7 AM warm shower every morning instead.
My brain is loaded. Things I need added: pay internet bill, call landlord, start a daily habit of reading 20 minutes every morning, and Jake's birthday party is this Saturday at 7 PM.
Today I'm going to be an absolute machine. Block out 'build entire app MVP' from 6 AM all the way through to 10 PM. Oh and add a 15-min wind-down breathing routine every night at 9:30 PM.

I wanted to add... wait, is that music from outside? Distracting. Okay. Add a 45-min guitar practice routine every evening at 8 PM. And actually add 'buy noise-canceling headphones' as an appointment.
I'm done with my old schedule, it's trash. Wipe out everything for today. I need a fresh start.
I need to... wait, no. Maybe tomorrow? Actually let's maybe do... nevermind I'll decide later.
Add a daily 20-minute walk every morning at 7 AM.
Add a product demo with the client team this Thursday at 2 PM.
Shift my 7 AM morning journaling session to 7:30 AM.
The 4 PM coffee chat I had scheduled today got canceled. Take it off my schedule.
I just finished the marketing report! Done.
Push everything I have for today to tomorrow.
Add 'floss teeth' as a new daily routine before bed. And add 'pick up sister from airport' as an appointment for tomorrow evening.
Add task: 'Sunday Weekly Review', time: 8:00 PM, every Sunday, category: Routine.
Just letting you know I finished my evening run today! Crushed it, feeling awesome.
Cancel... wait no, actually delete my 5 AM wakeup but let me think about adding a 6 AM one...
